name: Arroz Con Pollo #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and brown chicken in it for 10 minutes.
2. Add paprika, cilantro, onion, and garlic. Saute until onion is clear.
3. Stir in water, wine, tomatoes, bouillon cube, and seasonings; combine thoroughly.
4. Stir in celery, almonds, and rice. Cover and simmer 20 minutes.
5. Add peas and simmer another 10-20 minutes or until rice is ready.
